title: Tabernacle arrangement model
body: This is the most important,  authoritative controlling model for the other models

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
### puzzling over the altar of incense
- is the curtain that divides the holy of holies from the holy place a piece of furniture, a vessel? if it is a vessel or a piece of furniture, does it belong to the holy place or the holy of holies?
- are the holy of holies and the holy place one composite entity in the way that husband and wife are one flesh?
- where does the altar of incense stand according to Exodus 30? inside the holy of holies or inside the holy place outside of the holy of holies?
- Exodus 30:6
LEB And you will put it before the curtain that is upon the ark of the testimony, before the atonement cover, which is on the testimony, there where I will meet with you.
HB2 30:6 וְנָתַתָּה אֹתוֹ לִפְנֵי הַפָּרֹכֶת אֲשֶׁר עַל־אֲרֹן הָעֵדֻת לִפְנֵי הַכַּפֹּרֶת אֲשֶׁר עַל־הָעֵדֻת אֲשֶׁר אִוָּעֵד לְךָ שָׁמָּה: based on this verse which side of the curtain is the altar of incense on?

excerpt: This is the most important,  authoritative controlling model for the other models
